title: aconitum barbatum subsp. pekinense
intro: Aconitum barbatum subsp. pekinense, also known as the Chinese monk's hood or Peiping monk's hood, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Aconitum genus. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects. The plant contains compounds such as aconitine, which has been shown to have health benefits in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as potentially treating certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, Aconitum barbatum subsp. pekinense is often used in decoctions or infusions, although it requires careful preparation and dosing due to its toxicity.
